channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.thesixthaxis.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.thesixthaxis.com

item.title: Friendslop horror game Content Warning is now out on consoles
item.content:encoded:
Landfall has announced that Content Warning is out now for PS5, Xbox Series X|S, Xbox One, Switch 2 and Switch (but not PS4) bringing their friendslop horror game to almost all the consoles. Surprise!

The team has a little tradition of releasing games on April Fools, but with no new game coming this year – they still had a live stream to deliver the bad news – console ports are the treat to go with the trick.

With this launch, the team has also updated the Steam version of the game, adding crossplay so you can team up with friends on other platforms using friend codes. Oh, and it’s Steam Deck verified now, which is nice.

Content Warning patch notes:

  • Enabled crossplay and added crossplay to the settings menu
  • Fixed a bug that made users with Unicode characters in their PC name unable to record videos
  • The game is now Steam Deck verified
  • Improved localisation and missing characters in different fonts
  • Fixed multiple aspect ratio bugs

Content Warning released for PC on 1st April, part of the initial gag being that it was available for free for a limited time. With the viral success of this game, following on from the likes of Phasmophobia and Lethal Company, it quickly drew a huge number of downloads, around 6 million copies. Even with a price tag, it’s sold a further 2 million copies.

The game is a quirky mix of horror and coop. Your goal is to become SpookTube famous, heading into scary places, doing scary things, videoing it and (if you manage to survive) getting back to upload the footage.



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/04/01/friendslop-horror-game-content-warning-is-now-out-on-consoles/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
